productDisplayName: Fossil Men Johnston Rev Brown Belt
description: Crafted from pure leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe! Length: 36" Made of leather for durability and style Tang clasp with a fixed metal loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Brand badge next to the buckle Care Use a brass polish to maintain buckle shine Use a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
